title: React & Next.js Developer Portfolio
description: I’m a passionate Full-Stack Web Developer specializing in React, Next.js, Node.js, Express, and MongoDB. With hands-on experience in building modern, scalable, and responsive web applications.

title: Tech Gear-Full Stack E-commerce
description: Tech Gear is a modern e-commerce platform designed for selling the latest gadgets and accessories. Built with React.js, Node.js, Express, and MongoDB, it offers a fast, responsive, and secure shopping experience.

title: Smile Dental Care
description: Smile Dental Care is a modern web application designed for a dental clinic to manage appointments, patients, and services efficiently. Built with  React, Node.js, Express, and MongoDB.
